returns.remoteToken_: The address of the remote token if it is deployed or `address(0)` if not.

deployments(address).notice: Checks if a ERC20 token is deployed by the factory.
Checks if a ERC20 token is deployed by the factory.

userdoc.notice: Generic interface for IOptimismMintableERC20Factory and ISuperchainERC20Factory. Used to         determine if a ERC20 contract is deployed by a factory.

params._localToken: The address of the ERC20 token to check the deployment.

returns.remoteToken_: The address of the remote token if it is deployed or `address(0)` if not.
